title: Opening for Software Engineer at Cropin

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Cropin
jsonLd.description:
Cropin invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cropin:
Cropin is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin!
